frontmatter.description: A deploy has failed health checks and rollback is required to restore service

signature.embedding_seed: deploy failed rollback bad release health check

body:
## When this fires
The deploy pipeline reports a failed state — health checks did not pass, smoke tests broke, or the canary regressed.

## Playbook
1. Read failed-deploy-log to confirm the failure mode (boot crash vs. health check vs. canary regression).
2. Pull diff-since-last-good to identify the smallest change set that could be reverted.
3. Search tickets-similar-rollbacks for prior incidents with the same surface.

## Common confusion
This is *not* [[deploy-version-mismatch]]: that fires when two services have drifted apart in compatible-version-land, not when a fresh deploy itself fails.
